mnemonics.title: Six Categories: PF-DICP
mnemonics.content: Remember 'PF DICP' (Process Files, Devices Info Comms Protection) for the six categories: P = Process Control, F = File Management, D = Device Management, I = Information Maintenance, C = Communication, P = Protection.

mnemonics.title: Process Control Calls: FEESAW
mnemonics.content: Remember 'FEESAW' for key process control calls: F = Fork (create child), E = Exec (replace process image), E = Exit (terminate), S = Signal/abort, A = Allocate memory, W = Wait (wait for child).

mnemonics.title: File Operations Order: OCRWSC
mnemonics.content: Remember 'Open-Create-Read-Write-Seek-Close' as the typical lifecycle of file operations using system calls: open/create the file, read/write data, seek to positions, and close when done.
